before: SDHB mutation increases metastatic risk to more than {{c1::40}}%.
after: A {{c1::SDHB mutation}} is a high-risk clue for metastatic PPGL.
rule_candidate: Prefer hiding the risk relevant concept over a less meaningful number when both appear in the same sentence.

before: Rule of tens includes bilateral, extra-adrenal, and metastatic PPGL.
after: Define bilateral, extra-adrenal, and metastatic before presenting the Rule of tens.
rule_candidate: Insert foundation cards before frequency summaries that introduce unfamiliar axes.

before: CT image placed above the title without a caption cue.
after: Add a one-line cue below the image explaining that it is a localization clue, then separate it from the text block.
rule_candidate: Image cards need a cue and spacing before the next text block.
